_comment: Smoke-test fixture for release_notes_evidence.py. Each case has a pr_record and expected_class.

cases.description: Bugfix-only bullets — no behavioral signal → NO_RELEVANT_CHANGE

bullets: bug fix: handle null pointer in config loader
fixes #412: incorrect error message on timeout

deterministic.changelogText: This release contains bug fixes only. No API changes.

cases.description: Changelog declares explicit breaking change → BREAKING_CHANGE

bullets: BREAKING CHANGE: removed deprecated Connect() function

deterministic.changelogText: Major version bump. Breaking change: Connect() removed. Migration guide available.

cases.description: Function now returns an error — behavioral, possible break → POSSIBLE_CHANGE

bullets: now returns an error on HTTP 429 instead of silently retrying
default timeout behaviour changed for streamed responses

deterministic.changelogText: Retry logic now returns an error for rate-limited responses.

cases.description: No changelog text at all → UNAVAILABLE
release_notes field with documentation-only content → NO_RELEVANT_CHANGE

pr_record.release_notes: Documentation update: fixed typo in README. No functional change.

cases.description: release_notes field declares incompatible change → BREAKING_CHANGE

release_notes.body: This is a backward incompatible release. Migration guide: https://docs.example.com/migrate

cases.description: Only a bare version string as changelog — too thin → UNAVAILABLE
Function removed — possible break even without explicit 'breaking' keyword

bullets: removed the QueryRaw method which was deprecated in 1.2.0
bug fix: connection pool leak under high load
